title: rasa.canvas.context.v1 — the per-install context index (context.json)
description: Written by the AUDIT process (content/PROCESSES.md): the per-install registry of what exists to bind to — tenant flavor, sibling domains + modules, each module's collections (dir, record shape, per-field types, states, writable), and tenant data files. Per-install, discovered, disposable (re-derivable by re-running AUDIT). The index plans; files decide.

_audited_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the audit that wrote this index; advisory staleness signal

_tenant_flavor.description: structural detection (PROCESSES.md §AUDIT step 1) — never inferred from the mere presence of elements/

_tenant_root.description: the tenant root, relative to this app directory

claude_md.description: path to the tenant's CLAUDE.md, relative to this app directory

seam.description: the module's declared structure/config file, when one exists (read FIRST during discovery)

dir.description: collection directory, relative to the module's install/data root

fields.description: field name → type string ('string', 'date', 'enum(a|b|c)', …) — inferred, advisory

states.description: state subdirectories, in lifecycle order, when directory==state

writable.description: whether write-back is permitted here (module-mediated first — resolved OQ-4)
